title: Changed addon Plus
description: Adds new mechanics to Changed: MC Mod, including survival Untransfurmation, New Transfurs and more
body:
---

![BisectHosting Ad](https://www.bisecthosting.com/partners/custom-banners/af1122c6-6d8f-42aa-b0a0-a7f19af100cb.webp)

## New Features Added to LtxProgrammer Changed MC Mod:

### New Gameplay Mechanics

#### Craftable Untransfur Items
- **Litix-Camonia**:
  - **Syringe**: Instantly untransfurs you, with a chance of failure. If used repeatedly, it may cause side effects.
  - **Pot**: Slowly untransfurs you over time. Drinking milk or the effect reaching zero will stop the process.
  - **Fluid**: Converts infected blocks/players into a solvent that removes the infection.
- **Laething**:
  - **Syringe**: Instantly untransfurs you without side effects.

#### New Grab Mechanics (Before 2.5.4)
- **Friendly Grab**: Heals both transfurred and human players.
  - Requires both players to activate "friendly modes" by right-clicking.
- **Assimilation**: Converts a human player into a transfur player, strengthening the transfur in the process.
- **Normal Grab**: Infects a human player while retaining their conscience.
  - **Friendly Transfur**: Allows the transfur player to request consent from a human player for transformation.

### New Gamerules
- **Fight to Keep Your Conscience**: A new minigame gamerule.
- **Creatures Diet**: Increases food level when eating food suitable for your species.
- **Do Latex Infection**: When enabled, attacks that apply latex infection will continuously increase infection every tick (with a small cooldown), rapidly leading to full transformation.
- **Do Dazed Latex Burn**: Enables damage over time effects on dazed latex entities and players transformed in that form.
- * **Dark Latex Mask Transfur Time**: Defines how many ticks it takes for a Dark Latex Mask to start causing transfur damage on a entity that is holding it.
- * **Do Boss Transfur Permission**: Requires Admin permission before being able to be transfured into a boss transfur.
- * **And a Bunch more!*

### New Attributes
- **Transfur Resistance**: Reduces the Infection progress each tick. Values above 1 are more potent due to the default maximum progress of 20.
- **Transfur Infection**: Makes you get Infection damage each tick. Values above 1 are more potent due to the default maximum progress of 20.
- **Latex Solvent Damage Multiplier**: Make your attacks being affected by the solvent multiplier.

### New Items
- **Dark Latex Puddles**: Indicate nearby dark latex entities.
- **Hazard Armor**: Provides transfur resistance (max 0.5).
- **Dark Latex Coat**: Confuses Beasts and prevents them from attacking when both the cap and coat are worn.
- **And More**

### New Structures and Loot
- Discover new structures with rewarding loot, including Experiment 009 orbs, necessary for crafting the Spawn Egg.

## Transfur Extras Details
- **Sounds for Dog/Cat Transfurs**: Use the transfur extras GUI or chat commands like "meow" or "bark" to play a sound and have fun moments with your friends.
- **New Drink**: Orange Juice, crafted with four oranges, sugar, and a glass bottle.
- **Achievements**:
  - Transform into an Organic Form
  - Craft the Unifuser/Catlyzer
  - Craft and use Untransfur items
  - Activate Friendly Mode (Before 2.5.4)
  - And more!

## New Ores
- **Painite**: Found below Y -55. Requires a Netherite pickaxe to mine. Used as a expensive Trade item with villagers.
- **Iridium**: Also found below Y -55. Requires a Diamond pickaxe to mine. Used to upgrade the Unifuser, Catalyzer, and reinforce White Walls.

## New Entities
- **Foxyas**: Trades orange juice.
- **Prototype**: No specific actions yet.
- **Experiment 009**: A formidable boss with captivating music.
- Plus more!

## New Transfurs
- **Latex Snow Fox (Male/Female)**
- **BioSyth Snow Leopard (Male/Female)**
- **Puro Kind (Male/Female)**
- **Buny**
- More to discover!

## New Abilities
- **Leap**: Exclusive to Felines. Perform high jumps or dashes at the cost of food level.
- **Dodge**: Exclusive to Exp2. Teleport behind attackers or jump backwards to dodge incoming attacks.
- **Wither Wave**, **Shock Wave**, **ThunderBolt**: Exclusive to Exp9 and Exp10. Charge-based and instant abilities.
- **Carry**: Exclusive to a few variants. Allows carrying humanoid entities like villagers.
- **Psychic Pulse/Hold**: Reflect projectiles or falling blocks.
- **Dissolve**: Exclusive to Exp6. Set a quicksave point and teleport there at the cost of health.
- **Wings Flap (Aerial Exclusive)**: A charge/hold ability that boosts momentum when falling or enables a fast dash while flying.
- **And a ton more to test!**

## Facility Expansion! (Post-2.5.4)

*   New Exp009 facility piece! 
 * *It holds a bunch of chests with very good loot and some of lore pieces and ofc a fragment of Exp9 DNA... but what can you possibly do with it?*
*   New Exp10 facility piece!
 * *It holds a few chests with a mid/good loot and some of lore pieces and ofc a fragment of Exp10 DNA... but what can you possibly do with it?*
*   New Meteor facility piece!
 * *Look at a a meteor submersed on water... for some reason...*
* *And a bunch more pieces! have fun exploring!*

## 💡 Looking for Help to "Un-MCreator" and Clean Up the Project!

My mod has come a long way — and now it's time to take things to the next level by improving the codebase and leaving old limitations behind.

A large part of the mod still contains remnants of its early development in **MCreator**, including redundant code, auto-generated structures, and a few messy design decisions.

### 🛠️ What Does "Un-MCreator" Mean?

We're aiming to:

- 🧹 **Remove all unnecessary auto-generated MCreator code** that clutters the project.
- 🧠 **Refactor classes and systems** for clarity, readability, and proper separation of concerns.
- 🪓 **Eliminate redundancy** and unused or poorly implemented logic.
- 📦 **Unify registries and initialization logic** using proper Forge/NeoForge standards.
- 📚 **Improve code documentation** to make the project more contributor-friendly.
- ⚙️ **Enhance performance and modularity**, making systems more reusable and less coupled.

### 🤝 How You Can Help

I'm currently looking for:

- Developers experienced with **Minecraft Forge** (especially for versions 1.18.2 to 1.20.1).
- Contributors passionate about **code cleanup and refactoring**.
- Anyone interested in **learning real-world mod structure** and best practices through hands-on experience!

If you enjoy cleaning up spaghetti code, optimizing structure, and turning chaos into maintainable systems — you're more than welcome to join the effort!

Feel free to fork the repo, open PRs, or reach out with suggestions and improvements.


---

## Silly Notes
- Untransfur items are not canonical in the game lore, but they are part of the mod's additional mechanics because this mod don't limit its self with the "canonical only" features.

---

### FAQs

**Q: How do I summon Experiment-009?**  
A: Find a DNA sample in the destroyed laboratory and combine it with several items, including Painite Blocks, Diamond, and Iron Blocks.

**Q: Can you add X transfur?**  
A: Only interesting and fitting transfurs will be added, and nothing inappropriate.

**Q: How do I craft Untransfur items?**  
A: Check the recipe in JEI or the Experiment Book.

**Q: How does the Grab feature work?**  
A: Press H to open the Grab Radial Menu. Use different modes for entities and players, including Assimilate, Normal, and Friendly modes.

**Q: How do I mine Painite?**  
A: Use a Netherite pickaxe. Tinkers' tools may not work well yet.

**Q: Why can't I make cures?**  
A: Use the Unifuser or Catalyzer for cures. Shift-click if crafting doesn't work.

**Q: Where do I find the potions?**  
A: The "Untransfur Potion" is a potion effect needed to create arrows with effects.

**Q: How do I craft the Unifuser and Catalyzer?**  
A: Use redstone, a stone button, a latex syringe, and iron.

---

### COMPATIBILITIES

* This mod adds compatibility with vivecraft for the transfured players models.
* This mod has a compatibility with trimmed and is RECOMMENDED to use it for better trim system for items.

---

### IMPORTANT NOTE

Remember, this mod requires the latest version of the Changed mod to work well. For questions or assistance, join my Discord server: https://discord.gg/nR9RkW2A47. Enjoy the enhanced gameplay experience! You can find the Changed mod here: https://modrinth.com/mod/changed-minecraft-mod
